mapper.select: SELECT qr_id AS qrId, user_id AS userId, qr_code AS qrCode, qr_status AS qrStatus, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdDate FROM user_qr_codes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND qr_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY qr_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_qr_codes ( user_id, qr_code, qr_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{qrCode}, 'ACTIVE', NOW() )
